nasb.text: The Lord said to Moses, “I will also do this thing of which you have spoken; for you have found favor in My sight and I have known you by name.”

esv.text: And the Lord said to Moses, “This very thing that you have spoken I will do, for you have found favor in my sight, and I know you by name.”

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“你所說的這件事我也要作，因為你在我眼前蒙恩，並且我按著你的名字認識了你。”

ccb.text: 耶和华回答说：“我答应你的请求，因为你在我面前蒙了恩，我凭名字认识你。”
